settings.headline:
Wear
Light
Itself
settings.subtext: Crafted for those who understand that true luxury is felt before it is seen. The SS '26 collection arrives — singular, inevitable.

settings.items: New Arrivals | SS '26 Collection | Complimentary Shipping Over $500 | Limited Edition Pieces | Handcrafted in Italy | Bespoke Commissions Available

settings.quote:
"Luxury is not a necessity
to me — it is an art."
settings.body: Born from an obsession with perfection, Lumière exists for those who demand more from the world — and receive it. Each piece a collaboration between master artisans and the finest materials on earth.

settings.heading: Enter the Inner Circle
settings.body: First access to new collections, private events, and the rare opportunity to commission bespoke pieces.
settings.fine_print: By joining you agree to receive occasional correspondence of consequence.

settings.tagline: A house built on the belief that beauty, at its most refined, transcends adornment.
